title: Sticky pads permanent foam - double sided 12mm X 25mm 56 pads
features: price is for one pack of 56 permanent foam pads
many uses in the home, school and workplace

description: Sticky Pads Permanent foam - double sided 56 pads 12mm x 25mm MANY USES IN THE HOME, SCHOOL & WORKPLACE IDEAL FOR USE TO STICK POSTERS, PAINTINGS, AND INDOOR AND OUTDOOR ACCESSORIES. ADHERE TO CERAMICS, WOOD, GLASS, METAL,TILES ETC. How to use : 1.CLEAN AND DRY THE SURFACE THOROUGHLY 2.IF NECESSARY CUT THE PAD TO THE SIZE YOU NEED FOR A SMALL ITEMS - OR USE MORE PADS IF THE OBJECT TO BE FIXED IS LARGER 3. PEEL THE WHITE RELEASE PAPER ON THE BACK OF THE PAD AND PRESS FIRMLY ONTO THE SURFACE 4.PEEL THE WHITE RELEASE PAPER AND PUSH THE OBJECT TO THE STUCK FIRMLY IN PLACE .
